name: phase3-safety-audit
description: Full Phase 3 safety audit across all files

action.message:
Run a full Phase 3 safety audit across all files in phase-3-adaptive-visual-navigation/. Check every rule:

CAMERA SAFETY:
- Camera stream failures do NOT block or abort plan execution
- get_latest_frame() returning None causes immediate 'continue' — no API call
- _should_assess() returns False for 'stop' and 'connect' actions
- _should_assess() returns False when step_seconds < VISION_MIN_STEP_SECS

VISION ASSESSMENT SAFETY:
- VisionAssessor.assess() catches ALL exceptions — returns safe_continue(), never raises
- asyncio.wait_for wraps every assess_step() call with VISION_ASSESS_TIMEOUT
- replan_count < MAX_REPLANS checked before acting on 'replan'
- validate_plan() called on every vision-triggered replan

EMERGENCY STOP:
- Vision 'abort' calls deepracer_stop() BEFORE setting result.aborted
- Hardware step failure calls deepracer_stop() even when vision is active
- CameraPolicy.cleanup() calls camera_stream.stop()

PHASE 2 RULES (still apply):
- client.stop_car() in finally block in _move_for_duration()
- MAX_STEP_SECONDS hard cap enforced in execute_step() and validate_plan()
- Last step must be 'stop'
- DEEPRACER_PASSWORD never logged
- is_error() is single source of truth

Report all violations with file name and line number.
